note: Reviewed by fresh maker-not-checker agents across three passes (two full review-gate, one final scoped review-slice). All confirmed actionable defects were fixed. The final pass's only confirmed item was a cosmetic test-count in current-state.md (now made drift-proof). Latent/anticipatory or calm-design-contradicting findings (clock aria-label behind an unrendered guard, Notice role=status matching the spec's calm-inline intent, sub-1e-20 coordinate precision) were adversarially rejected. Security surface is architecturally minimal (keyless, no DB/auth/cookies); the full security sweep runs at the G7 global review.
fixedFindings: TopBar empty clock div: now conditionally rendered with i18n accessible name (NFR-A11Y-01, NFR-I18N-01)
lib/location/url.ts toLocationQuery: fixed-decimal coordinate serialization so small-magnitude deep links round-trip (regression test added)
lib/location/url.ts toLocationQuery: trims name so serialize/parse are exact inverses (regression test added)
app/page.tsx: deep-link/location view renders a real <h1> heading (NFR-A11Y-01)
i18n test: no-exclamation tone check extended to the en mirror table
